hero.title: About Hongye Furniture Group
hero.sub: Four decades of craftsmanship, innovation, and global reach — building spaces that inspire.

story.title: Building the World's Commercial Spaces Since 1984
story.p1: Hongye Furniture Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 with a single vision: to manufacture commercial furniture of the highest quality, delivered directly to clients without compromise. What began as a regional manufacturer has grown into a global commercial furniture powerhouse.
story.p2: Today, we operate from a 350,000㎡ state-of-the-art facility in China, serving over 50 countries across 5 continents. Our 2,000+ skilled craftspeople and engineers work daily to translate client visions into spaces that endure.
story.p3: We serve hotels, office developments, healthcare facilities, educational institutions, and luxury residential projects — always with factory-direct pricing and uncompromised quality.

v1.title: Craftsmanship First
v1.desc: Every piece leaving our factory reflects decades of accumulated knowledge. We don't cut corners — we refine processes.

v2.title: Transparency
v2.desc: No hidden fees, no surprise lead times. Our clients receive honest timelines, clear pricing, and open communication throughout.

v3.title: Sustainability
v3.desc: FSC-certified timber, water-based finishes, and energy-efficient production processes reflect our environmental commitment.

v4.title: Long-term Partnership
v4.desc: We measure success by repeat business. Our highest compliment is a client returning with a new project.

q1.q: Can you manufacture custom furniture to our exact specifications?
q1.a: Yes — full customization is our specialty. We can work from your design drawings, mood boards, or brand guidelines. Our in-house design team can also create bespoke designs for your approval before production begins.

q2.q: What is the minimum order quantity?
q2.a: For commercial projects, MOQ varies by product type. Generally, we work with project-based orders rather than unit quantities — a complete room set, floor, or full property supply is typical. Contact us with your project scope for guidance.

q3.q: What materials do you work with?
q3.a: We work with solid wood, MDF/particleboard, plywood, stainless steel, mild steel, aluminum, marble, glass, and a full range of upholstery materials. All timber is FSC-certified and all composite panels meet CARB emission standards.

q4.q: What quality certifications do you hold?
q4.a: Hongye holds ISO 9001:2015, CE Mark, SGS verification, BIFMA standard compliance, FSC certification, and CARB compliance. Copies of all certificates are available on request.

q5.q: Can we inspect the factory and products before shipment?
q5.a: Absolutely. Factory visits are welcome — we regularly host international clients for in-person visits and virtual tours. Pre-shipment inspection by third-party QC companies (SGS, Bureau Veritas, etc.) can also be arranged.

q6.q: Do you handle shipping and customs documentation?
q6.a: Yes — we provide complete export documentation including commercial invoice, packing list, bill of lading, certificate of origin, and fumigation certificate. We work with experienced freight forwarders for FOB, CFR, and CIF terms.

q7.q: What is the typical lead time?
q7.a: Standard lead times are 45–75 days for production after order confirmation, depending on order complexity and volume. We provide project-specific timelines during the quotation phase, including production schedule milestones.

q8.q: How do we start a project with Hongye?
q8.a: Submit your enquiry via WhatsApp, email, or the form on this page. Our project team will contact you within 24 hours to discuss your requirements. We'll then prepare a preliminary proposal and begin the design consultation process.

q9.a: All products carry a 2-year warranty. Our dedicated after-sales team handles replacement parts, repairs, and installation queries. For major markets, local service partners are available for on-site support.
